privileged_info_summary: Patient Cordie King (PID 13, DOB 1995-03-11, Female) is synthetic data from Synthea generator. The medication safety scenario is clinically accurate: Aspirin 325mg and Ibuprofen 600mg are both contraindicated with Warfarin anticoagulation therapy due to significantly increased bleeding risk (3-6x for GI bleeding per medical literature). Warfarin 5mg is a standard anticoagulant dose. INR (International Normalized Ratio)/Prothrombin Time is the correct monitoring test for Warfarin therapy (therapeutic target 2.0-3.0). All drug interaction claims are verified against peer-reviewed medical literature and clinical guidelines.
